The '''''Eclipse Rider''''' was a modified [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] that [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] rented<ref name="Bacta" /> in [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]]<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' places ''[[X-Wing: The Bacta War]]'', in which [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] rents the ''Eclipse Rider'', in [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]].</ref> during the preparations for the [[Bacta War]], a conflict between Antilles' independent [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] unit [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] and the pro-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Xucphra Corporation|government]] of<ref name="Bacta" /> the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]<ref name="AST">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]]. It was used by Antilles and fellow Rogue Squadron pilot [[Ooryl Qrygg]] for a trip from<ref name="Bacta" /> the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] planet<ref name="AST" /> [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to<ref name="Bacta" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] planet<ref name="AST" /> [[Rishi/Legends|Rishi]] to purchase a cache of [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighter]] parts.<ref name="Bacta" />

The trip out from Coruscant went well, but upon landing on Rishi, the ''Eclipse Rider'' lost a [[Repulsor coil/Legends|repulsorlift coil]]. While Antilles purchased the necessary X-wing parts, Qrygg worked on replacing the missing [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repuslorlift]] coil. Local regulations on the use of repulsorlift vehicles ultimately delayed the departure from Rishi by twelve [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]].<ref name="Bacta" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Eclipse Rider'' was mentioned in the novel ''[[X-Wing: The Bacta War]]'', written by [[Michael A. Stackpole]] and published in [[1997]].<ref name="Bacta" />
